Musso charmed audiences as Oliver in the hit show Hannah Montana, making kids laugh alongside Miley Cyrus. He also ruled in Pair of Kings, proving he was no one-hit wonder!
activity_question: Which TV show did Mitchel Musso star in alongside Miley Cyrus?
follow_up_question: Can you name another TV show Mitchel Musso starred in?

title: A Voice Star Is Born
story: Lights, camera, action! Pamela Adlon burst onto the scene in 1966, born on July 9 in New York City. This talented performer would grow up to become a voice acting sensation, bringing cartoon characters to life. Her most famous role? The mischievous Bobby Hill on the hit show King of the Hill, which earned her an Emmy Award.
activity_question: What famous cartoon character did Pamela Adlon voice?
follow_up_question: Have you ever tried doing different voices for fun?

title: Swimming Star Makes a Splash
story: Tatjana Smith splashed into the world on July 9, 1997, in Johannesburg, South Africa. This future swimming sensation would go on to make waves in the pool. Tatjana, whose maiden name was Schoenmaker, became an Olympic champion in breaststroke. She struck gold in the 200-meter event at the 2020 Olympics and later won the 100-meter race in 2024, proving herself a true aquatic powerhouse.
activity_question: In which swimming stroke did Tatjana Smith become an Olympic champion?
follow_up_question: Can you name the city where Tatjana Smith was born?
